steps.label: Objectives
steps.bodyHtml:
i. Use the alternating series test to test an alternating series for convergence

ii. Estimate the sum of an alternating series

ii. Explain the meaning of absolute convergence and conditional convergence

steps.label: Alternating Series
steps.bodyHtml:
Any series whose terms alternate between positive and negative values is called an alternating series. An alternating series can be written in the form \[\displaystyle\sum_{n=1}^{\infty}(-1)^{n+1}b_n=b_1-b_2+b_3-b_4+\cdots\]or
  \[\displaystyle\sum_{n=1}^{\infty}(-1)^nb_n=-b_1+b_2-b_3+\cdots\]where \(b_n>0\) for all positive integers n.
